ddls:
CREATE TABLE "water_data" (
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data collection */,
  "field_id" INTEGER /* ID of the field */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of data collection */,
  "rainfall" TEXT /* Amount of rainfall in inches */,
  "irrigation" TEXT /* Amount of irrigation water in inches */,
  "evapotranspiration" TEXT /* Evapotranspiration (ET) in inches */,
  "container_drainage" TEXT /* Container drainage in inches */,
  "runoff" TEXT /* Runoff in inches */,
  "runoff_nitrogen" TEXT /* Runoff nitrogen in pounds per acre */,
  "soil_moisture" TEXT /* Soil moisture content */,
  "soil_temperature" TEXT /* Soil temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "crop_health_index" TEXT /* Crop health index */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year", "field_id", "date")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the weather station */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the weather station */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the weather station */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the weather station */,
  "elevation" TEXT /* Elevation of the weather station in meters */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the weather station was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Last maintenance date of the weather station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "irrigation_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each irrigation method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the irrigation method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the irrigation method */,
  "efficiency" TEXT /* Efficiency of the irrigation method */,
  "cost_per_acre" TEXT /* Cost of the irrigation method per acre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crop_types" (
  "crop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crop type */,
  "crop_name" TEXT /* Name of the crop */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the crop */,
  "water_requirement" TEXT /* Water requirement of the crop in inches */,
  "fertilizer_requirement" TEXT /* Fertilizer requirement of the crop in pounds per acre */,
  "growth_period" TEXT /* Growth period of the crop */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "soil_types" (
  "soil_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each soil type */,
  "soil_name" TEXT /* Name of the soil */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the soil */,
  "pH_level" TEXT /* pH level of the soil */,
  "organic_matter_content" TEXT /* Organic matter content of the soil in percent */,
  "drainage" TEXT /* Drainage characteristics of the soil */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("soil_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fertilizer_types" (
  "fertilizer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fertilizer type */,
  "fertilizer_name" TEXT /* Name of the fertilizer */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fertilizer */,
  "nitrogen_content" TEXT /* Nitrogen content of the fertilizer in percent */,
  "phosphorus_content" TEXT /* Phosphorus content of the fertilizer in percent */,
  "potassium_content" TEXT /* Potassium content of the fertilizer in percent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fertilizer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "farmers" (
  "farmer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each farmer */,
  "farmer_name" TEXT /* Name of the farmer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the farmer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the farmer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the farmer */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the farmer registered with the system */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the farmer (e.g., farmer, researcher, agronomist) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("farmer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fields" (
  "field_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each field */,
  "farmer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the farmer managing the field */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station monitoring the field */,
  "crop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crop type grown in the field */,
  "soil_id" INTEGER /* ID of the soil type in the field */,
  "area" TEXT /* Area of the field in acres */,
  "last_irrigation_date" TEXT /* Date of the last irrigation event */,
  "last_fertilization_date" TEXT /* Date of the last fertilization event */,
  "soil_test_date" TEXT /* Date of the last soil test */,
  "soil_health_index" TEXT /* Soil health index */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("field_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fields_farmer_id FOREIGN KEY ("farmer_id") REFERENCES farmers ("farmer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fields_soil_id FOREIGN KEY ("soil_id") REFERENCES soil_types ("soil_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fields_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fields_crop_id FOREIGN KEY ("crop_id") REFERENCES crop_types ("crop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "irrigation_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each irrigation record */,
  "field_id" INTEGER /* ID of the field receiving irrigation */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the irrigation method used */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of water applied in inches */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the irrigation event */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the irrigation event in hours */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_irrigation_records_field_id FOREIGN KEY ("field_id") REFERENCES fields ("field_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_irrigation_records_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES irrigation_methods ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fertilization_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fertilization record */,
  "field_id" INTEGER /* ID of the field receiving fertilization */,
  "fertilizer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fertilizer used */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of fertilizer applied in pounds per acre */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the fertilization event */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method of fertilization (e.g., broadcast, injection) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fertilization_records_field_id FOREIGN KEY ("field_id") REFERENCES fields ("field_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fertilization_records_fertilizer_id FOREIGN KEY ("fertilizer_id") REFERENCES fertilizer_types ("fertilizer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rainfall_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rainfall record */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station recording the rainfall */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of rainfall in inches */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the rainfall event */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the rainfall event in hours */,
  "intensity" TEXT /* Intensity of the rainfall in inches per hour */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rainfall_records_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "runoff_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each runoff record */,
  "field_id" INTEGER /* ID of the field experiencing runoff */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of runoff in inches */,
  "nitrogen" TEXT /* Amount of nitrogen in the runoff in pounds per acre */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the runoff event */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the runoff (e.g., irrigation, rainfall) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_runoff_records_field_id FOREIGN KEY ("field_id") REFERENCES fields ("field_id")
)
